name: Gurthok Ironhide
sd_appearance: A massive, muscular Orc towers over the cobblestone streets, his deep green-grey skin and prominent tusks giving him an imposing presence. His battle-hardened eyes, hidden beneath a tattered leather jacket, survey the bustling Undercity with a calculating intensity. Chainmail armor peeks from beneath the jacket, a warhammer strapped to his back, its hammerhead adorned with intricate carvings of various creatures and symbols. A silver band with a single ruby encircles his left arm, a family heirloom that glimmers in the dim light, a testament to his unwavering loyalty to his hidden family within the Lower Undercity.
faction_visual: eclectic mix, deliberately no faction marks, one defining personal item
style_note: eclectic — no faction marks, which is itself a statement
